name: Tenneco Inc.
description: Tenneco Inc. is a leading global designer, manufacturer, and marketer of automotive products for original equipment and aftermarket customers. The company provides advanced solutions in clean air, powertrain, and ride performance systems, serving light vehicle, commercial truck, and off-highway markets. With a commitment to engineering excellence and sustainability, Tenneco operates through various business segments, including DRiV, to deliver high-performance technologies that enhance vehicle efficiency, safety, and comfort. Headquartered in the United States, the company leverages a vast global footprint of manufacturing and engineering facilities to support its position as a trusted partner in the transportation industry.
